name: Soul Brothers' Black-Eyed Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the black-eyed peas, salt, chopped celery, bell pepper, onions, parsley, and vegetable oil in a heavy-bottomed soup pot.
2. Cook until tender, approximately 1 1/2 hours.
3. Add more salt to taste, if desired.
PER SERVING: 235 calories, 14 g protein, 37 g carbohydrate, 4 g fat (1 g saturated), 0 mg cholesterol, 824 mg sodium, 10 g fiber.
